items.title: Stocks dip as government shutdown continues, rare earths rally: What to watch this week
items.description: The stock market will enter the second full week of the government shutdown. Investors will also focus on big bank earnings.

items.title: Does Warren Buffett Know Something Wall Street Doesn't? The Billionaire Legend Dumps $122 Billion of This Key Holding While Buying $4 Billion of These Out-of-Favor Stocks.
items.author: Adam Levy
items.description: Warren Buffett has been selling Apple stock and reinvesting in UnitedHealth and Constellation Brands, taking advantage of market conditions and potential long-term growth opportunities in healthcare and beer industries.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Sold 70% of stake due to high valuation and potential future tax changes, despite previous successful investment
Long-term competitive advantages, strong growth potential in aging population market, despite current earnings challenges
Facing headwinds in beer market with declining sales volume, but strong brand positioning and potential for future recovery
